headline: DigitalOcean's 31MW GPU Buildout Sets the Stage for 2027 AI Growth
summary: DOCN plans 31MW of new GPU capacity in 2026, leaning on leases and an Agentic Inference Cloud to meet supply-starved AI inference demand.
